ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene (e.g., ENSMUSG00000034936) */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* Ending position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene */,
  "biotype" TEXT /* Biotype of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene */,
  "gene_version" TEXT /* Version of the gene data */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Commonly used symbol for the gene */,
  "gene_synonyms" TEXT /* List of synonyms for the gene */,
  "gene_sequence" TEXT /* Nucleotide sequence of the gene */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Summary of the gene's known functions */,
  "gene_diseases" TEXT /* List of diseases associated with the gene */,
  "gene_publications" TEXT /* List of publications related to the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_data" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression data entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene analyzed */,
  "logFC" REAL /* Log fold change of gene expression */,
  "logCPM" REAL /* Log counts per million of gene expression */,
  "LR" REAL /* Likelihood ratio of gene expression */,
  "PValue" REAL /* P-value of statistical significance */,
  "FDR" REAL /* False discovery rate adjusted p-value */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample the expression data belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or pipeline used for the analysis */,
  "qc_metrics" TEXT /* Quality control metrics for the expression data */,
  "gene_set_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene set for enrichment analysis */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* ID of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, bioinformatician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene expression data accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analysis) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES expression_data ("expression_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene annotated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., NCBI, Ensembl) */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., functional annotation, pathway) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the annotation */,
  "annotation_version" TEXT /* Version of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created or updated */,
  "annotation_source_version" TEXT /* Version of the external database used for the annotation */,
  "annotation_url" TEXT /* URL to the original annotation data in the external database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES external_databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the external database */,
  "API_URL" TEXT /* API URL for accessing the external database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external database and its purpose */,
  "database_version" TEXT /* Version of the external database */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Last date the database was synchronized with the platform */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the database is synchronized */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequencing_data" (
  "sequencing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequencing data file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample the sequencing data belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the sequencing data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the sequencing data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of the processing of the sequencing data */,
  "sequencer_type" TEXT /* Type of sequencer used to generate the data */,
  "sequencing_run_id" TEXT /* ID of the sequencing run */,
  "sequencing_center" TEXT /* Center or facility where the sequencing was performed */,
  "sequencing_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for sequencing */,
  "data_integrity" TEXT /* Metrics to assess the integrity of the sequencing data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality metrics for the sequencing data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequencing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the sample was taken */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue from which the sample was taken */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample and its purpose */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., tissue, blood, cell line) */,
  "biological_replicate" TEXT /* Indicates if the sample is a biological replicate */,
  "technical_replicate" TEXT /* Indicates if the sample is a technical replicate */,
  "sample_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the sample (e.g., control, treatment) */,
  "sample_treatment" TEXT /* Treatment applied to the sample */,
  "sample_disease" TEXT /* Disease state of the sample */,
  "sample_age" TEXT /* Age of the organism when the sample was collected */,
  "sample_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the organism when the sample was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)
